@keyframes show-content-image{

  99%{

}
@keyframes turn-off-visibility{

  99%{
    opacity:0;

    visibility:hidden;
  }

@keyframes lightbox-zoom-in{
  0%{
    transform:translate(calc((-100vw + var(--wp--lightbox-scrollbar-width))/2 + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-left-position)), calc(-50vh + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-top-position))) scale(var(--wp--lightbox-scale));
  }
  to{
    transform:translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
  }
}
@keyframes lightbox-zoom-out{
  0%{
    transform:translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
    visibility:visible;
  }
  99%{
    visibility:visible;
  }
  to{
    transform:translate(calc((-100vw + var(--wp--lightbox-scrollbar-width))/2 + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-left-position)), calc(-50vh + var(--wp--lightbox-initial-top-position))) scale(var(--wp--lightbox-scale));

<style id="wp-block-video-inline-css" type="text/css">

<style id="wp-block-columns-inline-css" type="text/css">
.wp-block-columns{
  box-sizing:border-box;
  display:flex;
  flex-wrap:wrap !important;
}
@media (min-width:782px){
  .wp-block-columns{
    flex-wrap:nowrap !important;
  }
}
.wp-block-columns{
  align-items:normal !important;
}
.wp-block-columns.are-vertically-aligned-top{
  align-items:flex-start;
}
.wp-block-columns.are-vertically-aligned-center{
  align-items:center;
}
.wp-block-columns.are-vertically-aligned-bottom{
  align-items:flex-end;
}
@media (max-width:781px){
  .wp-block-columns:not(.is-not-stacked-on-mobile)>.wp-block-column{
    flex-basis:100% !important;
  }
}
@media (min-width:782px){
  .wp-block-columns:not(.is-not-stacked-on-mobile)>.wp-block-column{
    flex-basis:0;
    flex-grow:1;
  }
  .wp-block-columns:not(.is-not-stacked-on-mobile)>.wp-block-column[style*=flex-basis]{
    flex-grow:0;
  }
}
.wp-block-columns.is-not-stacked-on-mobile{
  flex-wrap:nowrap !important;
}
.wp-block-columns.is-not-stacked-on-mobile>.wp-block-column{
  flex-basis:0;
  flex-grow:1;
}
.wp-block-columns.is-not-stacked-on-mobile>.wp-block-column[style*=flex-basis]{
  flex-grow:0;
}

:where(.wp-block-columns){
  margin-bottom:1.75em;
}

:where(.wp-block-columns.has-background){
  padding:1.25em 2.375em;
}

.wp-block-column{
  flex-grow:1;
  min-width:0;
  overflow-wrap:break-word;
  word-break:break-word;
}
.wp-block-column.is-vertically-aligned-top{
  align-self:flex-start;
}
.wp-block-column.is-vertically-aligned-center{
  align-self:center;
}
.wp-block-column.is-vertically-aligned-bottom{
  align-self:flex-end;
}
.wp-block-column.is-vertically-aligned-stretch{
  align-self:stretch;
}
.wp-block-column.is-vertically-aligned-bottom,.wp-block-column.is-vertically-aligned-center,.wp-block-column.is-vertically-aligned-top{
  width:100%;
}
/*# sourceURL=https://codrops-1f606.kxcdn.com/codrops/wp-includes/blocks/columns/style.css?x72090 */
</style>
<style id="wp-block-paragraph-inline-css" type="text/css">

  font-size:.875em;
}

.is-regular-text{
  font-size:1em;
}

.is-large-text{
  font-size:2.25em;
}

.is-larger-text{
  font-size:3em;
}

.has-drop-cap:not(:focus):first-letter{
  float:left;
  font-size:8.4em;
  font-style:normal;
  font-weight:100;
  line-height:.68;
  margin:.05em .1em 0 0;
  text-transform:uppercase;
}

body.rtl .has-drop-cap:not(:focus):first-letter{
  float:none;
  margin-left:.1em;
}

p.has-drop-cap.has-background{
  overflow:hidden;
}

:root :where(p.has-background){
  padding:1.25em 2.375em;
}

:where(p.has-text-color:not(.has-link-color)) a{
  color:inherit;
}

p.has-text-align-left[style*="writing-mode:vertical-lr"],p.has-text-align-right[style*="writing-mode:vertical-rl"]{
  rotate:180deg;
}

</style>

								<h1>Creating Dynamic Terrain Deformation with React Three Fiber</h1>
								<div class="ct-post-excerpt"><p>An exploration of real-time terrain reshaping through user interactions, using React Three Fiber.</p>
</div>
                                <p class="ct-post-tags">
                  <a href="https://tympanus.net/codrops/tag/3d/">3D</a> <a href="https://tympanus.net/codrops/tag/react-three-fiber/">React Three Fiber</a> <a href="https://tympanus.net/codrops/tag/three-js/">Three.js</a> <a href="https://tympanus.net/codrops/tag/webgl/">WebGL</a>                 </p>
                								
							</header>

Access the world’s most comprehensive GSAP training with 300+ lessons. Enroll now →</a></p></div>								
<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81c1-8b56-e0c4a4af03ab">In this tutorial, we will explore <strong>how to dynamically deform terrain</strong>, a feature widely used in modern games. Some time ago, we learned about how to create <a href="https://tympanus.net/Tutorials/ps1-jitter-shader/">the PS1 jitter shader</a>, taking a nostalgic journey into retro graphics. Transitioning from that retro vibe to cutting-edge techniques has been exciting to me, and I’m happy to see so much interest in these topics. <br><br>This tutorial will be divided into two parts. In the first part, we’ll focus on Dynamic Terrain Deformation, exploring how to create and manipulate terrain interactively. In the second part, we’ll take it a step further by creating an <strong>unlimited walking zone</strong> using the generated pieces, all while maintaining optimal performance.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81c9-817d-c06b98ac449c">Building Interactive Terrain Deformation Step by Step</h2>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8196-80e4-f35555dbe070">After setting up the scene, we’ll create a <code class="" data-line="">planeGeometry</code> and apply the snow texture obtained from AmbientCG. To enhance realism, we’ll increase the <code class="" data-line="">displacementScale</code> value, creating a more dynamic and lifelike snowy environment. We’ll dive into CHUNKs later in the tutorial.</p>

<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81b9-9bab-efa55f9b51f1">After creating the <code class="" data-line="">planeGeometry</code>, we’ll explore the <code class="" data-line="">deformMesh</code> function—the core of this demo.</p>



<pre class="wp-block-prismatic-blocks language-javascript" tabindex="0"><code class="language-javascript" data-line=""><span class="token keyword">const</span> deformMesh <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">useCallback</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token parameter">mesh<span class="token punctuation">,</span> point</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token operator">!</span>mesh<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">return</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Retrieve neighboring chunks around the point of deformation.</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> neighboringChunks <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">getNeighboringChunks</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>point<span class="token punctuation">,</span> chunksRef<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Temporary vector to hold vertex positions during calculations</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> tempVertex <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">THREE<span class="token punctuation">.</span>Vector3</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Array to keep track of geometries that require normal recomputation</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> geometriesToUpdate <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Iterate through each neighboring chunk to apply deformations</span>
    neighboringChunks<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">forEach</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token parameter">chunk</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
      <span class="token keyword">const</span> geometry <span class="token operator">=</span> chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">;</span>

      <span class="token comment">// Validate that the chunk has valid geometry and position attributes</span>
      <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token operator">!</span>geometry <span class="token operator">||</span> <span class="token operator">!</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>attributes <span class="token operator">||</span> <span class="token operator">!</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>attributes<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
        <span class="token keyword">return</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

      <span class="token keyword">const</span> positionAttribute <span class="token operator">=</span> geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>attributes<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">;</span>
      <span class="token keyword">const</span> vertices <span class="token operator">=</span> positionAttribute<span class="token punctuation">.</span>array<span class="token punctuation">;</span>

      <span class="token comment">// Flag to determine if the current chunk has been deformed</span>
      <span class="token keyword">let</span> hasDeformation <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">false</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

      <span class="token comment">// Loop through each vertex in the chunk's geometry</span>
      <span class="token keyword">for</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token keyword">let</span> i <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> i <span class="token operator"><</span> positionAttribute<span class="token punctuation">.</span>count<span class="token punctuation">;</span> i<span class="token operator">++</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
        <span class="token comment">// Extract the current vertex's position from the array</span>
        tempVertex<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">fromArray</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>vertices<span class="token punctuation">,</span> i <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

        <span class="token comment">// Convert the vertex position from local to world coordinates</span>
        chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">localToWorld</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>tempVertex<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

        <span class="token comment">// Calculate the distance between the vertex and the point of influence</span>
        <span class="token keyword">const</span> distance <span class="token operator">=</span> tempVertex<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">distanceTo</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>point<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

        <span class="token comment">// Check if the vertex is within the deformation radius</span>
        <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>distance <span class="token operator"><</span> <span class="token constant">DEFORM_RADIUS</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
            <span class="token comment">// Calculate the influence of the deformation based on distance.</span>
            <span class="token comment">// The closer the vertex is to the point, the greater the influence.</span>
            <span class="token comment">// Using a cubic falloff for a smooth transition.</span>
          <span class="token keyword">const</span> influence <span class="token operator">=</span> Math<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">pow</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>
            <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token constant">DEFORM_RADIUS</span> <span class="token operator">-</span> distance<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token constant">DEFORM_RADIUS</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
            <span class="token number">3</span>
          <span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token comment">// Calculate the vertical offset (y-axis) to apply to the vertex.</span>
          <span class="token comment">// This creates a depression effect that simulates impact or footprint.</span>
          <span class="token keyword">const</span> yOffset <span class="token operator">=</span> influence <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">10</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
          tempVertex<span class="token punctuation">.</span>y <span class="token operator">-=</span> yOffset <span class="token operator">*</span> Math<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">sin</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>distance <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token constant">DEFORM_RADIUS</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> Math<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token constant">PI</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          
          <span class="token comment">// Add a wave effect to the vertex's y-position.</span>
          <span class="token comment">// This simulates ripples or disturbances caused by the deformation.</span>
          tempVertex<span class="token punctuation">.</span>y <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token constant">WAVE_AMPLITUDE</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> Math<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">sin</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token constant">WAVE_FREQUENCY</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> distance<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token comment">// Convert the modified vertex position back to local coordinates</span>
          chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">worldToLocal</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>tempVertex<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token comment">// Update the vertex position in the geometry's position array</span>
          tempVertex<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">toArray</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>vertices<span class="token punctuation">,</span> i <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

          <span class="token comment">// Mark that this chunk has undergone deformation</span>
          hasDeformation <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
        <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">}</span>

      <span class="token comment">// If any vertex in the chunk was deformed, update the geometry accordingly</span>
      <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>hasDeformation<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
        <span class="token comment">// Indicate that the position attribute needs to be updated</span>
        positionAttribute<span class="token punctuation">.</span>needsUpdate <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

        <span class="token comment">// Add the geometry to the list for batch normal recomputation</span>
        geometriesToUpdate<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">push</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

        <span class="token comment">// Save the deformation state for potential future use or persistence</span>
        <span class="token function">saveChunkDeformation</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>chunk<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

     
     <span class="token comment">// After processing all neighboring chunks, recompute the vertex normals</span>
     <span class="token comment">// for each affected geometry. This ensures that lighting and shading</span>
     <span class="token comment">// accurately reflect the new geometry after deformation.</span>
    <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>geometriesToUpdate<span class="token punctuation">.</span>length <span class="token operator">></span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
      geometriesToUpdate<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">forEach</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token parameter">geometry</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">computeVertexNormals</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">[</span>
    getNeighboringChunks<span class="token punctuation">,</span> 
    chunksRef<span class="token punctuation">,</span> 
    saveChunkDeformation<span class="token punctuation">,</span> 
  <span class="token punctuation">]</span>
<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></code></pre>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8165-8c94-d039e611fb1e">I added the <strong>“Add a subtle wave effect for visual variation”</strong> part to this function to address an issue that was limiting the natural appearance of the snow as the track formed. The edges of the snow needed to bulge slightly. Here’s what it looked like before I added it:</p>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img decoding="async" width="800" height="489" src="https://codrops-1f606.kxcdn.com/codrops/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/particle-problem.gif?x72090" alt="" class="wp-image-83154"></figure>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81a9-9a33-df69b98908e3">After creating the <code class="" data-line="">deformMesh</code> function, we’ll determine where to use it to complete the Dynamic Terrain Deformation. Specifically, we’ll integrate it into <code class="" data-line="">useFrame</code>, selecting the right and left foot bones in the character animation and extracting their positions from <code class="" data-line="">matrixWorld</code>.</p>



<pre class="wp-block-prismatic-blocks language-javascript" tabindex="0"><code class="language-javascript" data-line=""><span class="token function">useFrame</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token parameter">state<span class="token punctuation">,</span> delta</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token comment">// Other codes...</span>

  <span class="token comment">// Get the bones representing the character's left and right feet</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> leftFootBone <span class="token operator">=</span> characterRef<span class="token punctuation">.</span>current<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">getObjectByName</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"mixamorigLeftFoot"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> rightFootBone <span class="token operator">=</span> characterRef<span class="token punctuation">.</span>current<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">getObjectByName</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">"mixamorigRightFoot"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>leftFootBone<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token comment">// Get the world position of the left foot bone</span>
    tempVector<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">setFromMatrixPosition</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>leftFootBone<span class="token punctuation">.</span>matrixWorld<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Apply terrain deformation at the position of the left foot</span>
    <span class="token function">deformMesh</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>activeChunk<span class="token punctuation">,</span> tempVector<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>

  <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>rightFootBone<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token comment">// Get the world position of the right foot bone</span>
    tempVector<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">setFromMatrixPosition</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>rightFootBone<span class="token punctuation">.</span>matrixWorld<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Apply terrain deformation at the position of the right foot</span>
    <span class="token function">deformMesh</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>activeChunk<span class="token punctuation">,</span> tempVector<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>

  <span class="token comment">// Other codes...</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></code></pre>



<p>And there you have it: a smooth, dynamic deformation in action!</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81a8-a35f-e28c65cecf4e"><strong>Unlimited Walking with CHUNKs</strong></h2>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8113-b7ce-f455b5c62234">In the code we’ve explored so far, you might have noticed the <code class="" data-line="">CHUNK</code> parts. In simple terms, we create snow blocks arranged in a 3×3 grid. To ensure the character always stays in the center, we remove the previous <code class="" data-line="">CHUNKs</code> based on the direction the character is moving and generate new <code class="" data-line="">CHUNKs</code> ahead in the same direction. You can see this process in action in the GIF below. However, this method introduced several challenges.</p>



<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="800" height="512" src="https://codrops-1f606.kxcdn.com/codrops/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/infinite-chunks-problem.gif?x72090" alt="" class="wp-image-83157"></figure>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81a0-90a0-ea930493a933"><strong>Problems:</strong></p>



<ul id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81ba-b110-f877fae36798" class="wp-block-list">
<li>Gaps appear at the joints between CHUNKs</li>



<li>Vertex calculations are disrupted at the joints</li>



<li>Tracks from the previous CHUNK vanish instantly when transitioning to a new CHUNK</li>
</ul>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8100-aa65-c596cbdc494b"><strong>Solutions:</strong></p>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8100-aa65-c596cbdc494b"><strong>1. getChunkKey</strong></p>



<pre class="wp-block-prismatic-blocks language-javascript" tabindex="0"><code class="language-javascript" data-line=""><span class="token comment">// Generates a unique key for a chunk based on its current position.</span>
<span class="token comment">// Uses globally accessible CHUNK_SIZE for calculations.</span>
<span class="token comment">// Purpose: Ensures each chunk can be uniquely identified and managed in a Map.</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> deformedChunksMapRef <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">useRef</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">Map</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token function-variable function">getChunkKey</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span>
  <span class="token template-string"><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>Math<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">round</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>currentChunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>x <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token constant">CHUNK_SIZE</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">,</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>Math<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">round</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>currentChunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>z <span class="token operator">/</span> <span class="token constant">CHUNK_SIZE</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></code></pre>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8172-8af8-d025a68fd521"><strong>2. saveChunkDeformation</strong></p>



<pre class="wp-block-prismatic-blocks language-javascript" tabindex="0"><code class="language-javascript" data-line=""><span class="token comment">// Saves the deformation state of the current chunk by storing its vertex positions.</span>
<span class="token comment">// Purpose: Preserves the deformation of a chunk for later retrieval.</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token function-variable function">saveChunkDeformation</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token operator">!</span>currentChunk<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">return</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token comment">// Generate the unique key for this chunk</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> chunkKey <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">getChunkKey</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token comment">// Save the current vertex positions into the deformation map</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> position <span class="token operator">=</span> currentChunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>attributes<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  deformedChunksMapRef<span class="token punctuation">.</span>current<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">set</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>
    chunkKey<span class="token punctuation">,</span>
    <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">Float32Array</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>array<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></code></pre>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8168-8f65-f5f9a44e7ba4"><strong>3. loadChunkDeformation</strong></p>



<pre class="wp-block-prismatic-blocks language-javascript" tabindex="0"><code class="language-javascript" data-line=""><span class="token comment">// Restores the deformation state of the current chunk, if previously saved.</span>
 <span class="token comment">// Purpose: Ensures that deformed chunks retain their state when repositioned.</span>
 
<span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token function-variable function">loadChunkDeformation</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token operator">!</span>currentChunk<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">false</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token comment">// Retrieve the unique key for this chunk</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> chunkKey <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">getChunkKey</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token comment">// Get the saved deformation data for this chunk</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> savedDeformation <span class="token operator">=</span> deformedChunksMapRef<span class="token punctuation">.</span>current<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">get</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>chunkKey<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

  <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>savedDeformation<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> position <span class="token operator">=</span> currentChunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>attributes<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Restore the saved vertex positions</span>
    position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>array<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">set</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>savedDeformation<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>needsUpdate <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    currentChunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">computeVertexNormals</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
  <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token boolean">false</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></code></pre>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8111-a248-e4b82de57673"><strong>4. getNeighboringChunks</strong></p>



<pre class="wp-block-prismatic-blocks language-javascript" tabindex="0"><code class="language-javascript" data-line=""><span class="token comment">// Finds chunks that are close to the current position.</span>
<span class="token comment">// Purpose: Limits deformation operations to only relevant chunks, improving performance.</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token function-variable function">getNeighboringChunks</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">return</span> chunksRef<span class="token punctuation">.</span>current<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">filter</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token parameter">chunk</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token comment">// Calculate the distance between the chunk and the current position</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> distance <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">THREE<span class="token punctuation">.</span>Vector2</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>
      chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>x <span class="token operator">-</span> currentPosition<span class="token punctuation">.</span>x<span class="token punctuation">,</span>
      chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>z <span class="token operator">-</span> currentPosition<span class="token punctuation">.</span>z
    <span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">length</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// Include chunks within the deformation radius</span>
    <span class="token keyword">return</span> distance <span class="token operator"><</span> <span class="token constant">CHUNK_SIZE</span> <span class="token operator">+</span> <span class="token constant">DEFORM_RADIUS</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></code></pre>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-816a-9183-fe0ce7a1e241"><strong>5. recycleDistantChunks</strong></p>



<pre class="wp-block-prismatic-blocks language-javascript" tabindex="0"><code class="language-javascript" data-line=""><span class="token comment">// Recycles chunks that are too far from the character by resetting their deformation state.</span>
<span class="token comment">// Purpose: Prepares distant chunks for reuse, maintaining efficient resource usage.</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token function-variable function">recycleDistantChunks</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  chunksRef<span class="token punctuation">.</span>current<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">forEach</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token parameter">chunk</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token comment">// Calculate the distance between the chunk and the character</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> distance <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">THREE<span class="token punctuation">.</span>Vector2</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>
      chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>x <span class="token operator">-</span> characterPosition<span class="token punctuation">.</span>x<span class="token punctuation">,</span>
      chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>z <span class="token operator">-</span> characterPosition<span class="token punctuation">.</span>z
    <span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">length</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

    <span class="token comment">// If the chunk is beyond the unload distance, reset its deformation</span>
    <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>distance <span class="token operator">></span> <span class="token constant">CHUNK_UNLOAD_DISTANCE</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
      <span class="token keyword">const</span> geometry <span class="token operator">=</span> chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>geometry<span class="token punctuation">;</span>
      <span class="token keyword">const</span> originalPosition <span class="token operator">=</span> geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>userData<span class="token punctuation">.</span>originalPosition<span class="token punctuation">;</span>

      <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>originalPosition<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
        <span class="token comment">// Reset vertex positions to their original state</span>
        geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>attributes<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>array<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">set</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>originalPosition<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
        geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span>attributes<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>needsUpdate <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

        <span class="token comment">// Recompute normals for correct lighting</span>
        geometry<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">computeVertexNormals</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
      <span class="token punctuation">}</span>

      <span class="token comment">// Remove the deformation data for this chunk</span>
      <span class="token keyword">const</span> chunkKey <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">getChunkKey</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>x<span class="token punctuation">,</span> chunk<span class="token punctuation">.</span>position<span class="token punctuation">.</span>z<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
      deformedChunksMapRef<span class="token punctuation">.</span>current<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">delete</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>chunkKey<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></code></pre>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-811c-bfef-d0c9f64e9505">With these functions, we resolved the issues with CHUNKs, achieving the look we aimed for.</p>



<figure class="wp-block-video"><video height="900" style="aspect-ratio: 1440 / 900;" width="1440" autoplay="" controls="" loop="" muted="" src="https://codrops-1f606.kxcdn.com/codrops/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/terraindeformation_feat.mp4?x72090" playsinline=""></video><figcaption class="wp-element-caption">A video of the <a href="https://tympanus.net/Tutorials/DynamicTerrainDeformation">final demo</a></figcaption></figure>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading" id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8125-b639-f0e25c60d38d">Conclusion</h3>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81a3-8c28-d3cccf5c14e8">In this tutorial, we covered the basics of creating <strong>Dynamic Terrain Deformation</strong> using React Three Fiber. From implementing realistic snow deformation to managing <strong>CHUNKs</strong> for unlimited walking zones, we explored some core techniques and tackled common challenges along the way.</p>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-81f7-b76b-d0d7882e07bf">While this project focused on the essentials, it provides a solid starting point for building more complex features, such as advanced character controls or dynamic environments. The concepts of vertex manipulation and chunk management are versatile and can be applied to many other creative projects.</p>



<p id="14b0dea9-ffa2-8184-b4f7-cca945ba53c5">Thank you for following along, and I hope this tutorial inspires you to create your own interactive 3D experiences! If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to <a href="https://x.com/otfnk">reach out me</a>. Happy coding! 🎉</p>
